falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: OCC contention is noise and not operationally meaningful
falsificationQueries: Check if high OCC retries co-occur with no measurable progression impact
Check whether run completions continue despite contention
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Runs did complete, but repeated contention coincided with manual reconcile/heal overhead and degraded operator confidence. Contention is not purely harmless noise.
